deployments.summary: Restored webhook delivery worker stability and improved retry handling.

drafts_review.original_draft: Please provide an affected event ID, the incorrect fields and values received, and the values you expected.

messages.message: Webhook deliveries are failing and recent events are not reaching our configured endpoint.
Our application receives your webhooks, but signature verification has recently started failing. Please investigate.
Recently, some webhook events have contained incorrect customer information. Please investigate.
Please provide an affected event ID, the incorrect fields and values received, and the values you expected.

ticket_history.title: Our webhooks are failing.
ticket_history.description: Webhook deliveries are failing and recent events are not reaching our configured endpoint.

ticket_history.title: Just saying hello
ticket_history.description: Hi team, I just wanted to say hello and hope you are having a great day.

ticket_history.title: Our webhooks are failing.
ticket_history.description: Hello! Recently, we didn't receive one of our messages. Please investigate!

ticket_history.title: Webhook signature verification is failing
ticket_history.description: Our application receives your webhooks, but signature verification has recently started failing. Please investigate.

ticket_history.title: Webhook events contain incorrect data
ticket_history.description: Recently, some webhook events have contained incorrect customer information. Please investigate.
